result.title: Add AGENTS docs for media VCL

entries.text: Document the current VCL behavior and keep the work tracked.

steps.step: Start the implementation by creating a local root plan file named `IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.local.md` and add that exact filename to `.gitignore`.
The local plan file should begin with a short facts/goals section, followed by a `To-Do` section using Markdown checkboxes that get updated as work is completed.
Establish the repo pattern for scoped context, but implement it fully only for `gif-media` in this pass.
